intro_highlights.text: Existing approaches encode depth maps along with RGB images and perform feature fusion between them to enable more robust predictions.
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 该句用于引言中高密度阐述问题背景或方法动机，语义完整且可直接复用。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: In <scenario>, <challenge> remains difficult because <key bottleneck>, motivating <our idea>.

intro_highlights.text: Taking into account that depth can be regarded as a geometry supplement for RGB images, a straightforward question arises: Do we really need to explicitly encode depth information with neural networks as done for RGB images?
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 该句用于引言中高密度阐述问题背景或方法动机，语义完整且可直接复用。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: In <scenario>, <challenge> remains difficult because <key bottleneck>, motivating <our idea>.

intro_highlights.text: Based on this insight, in this paper, we investigate a new way to learn RGBD feature representations and present DFormerv2, a strong RGBD encoder that explicitly uses depth maps as geometry priors rather than encoding depth information with neural networks.
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 该句用于引言中高密度阐述问题背景或方法动机，语义完整且可直接复用。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: In <scenario>, <challenge> remains difficult because <key bottleneck>, motivating <our idea>.

architecture_mapping.paper_evidence: 引言通常先定义任务场景与应用价值。
中段会指出现有方法在复杂场景下的失败模式。
末段给出方法主线与贡献列表。
